--- a/src/widgets/list.rs
+++ b/src/widgets/list.rs
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ impl List {
     pub fn render(&self, area: Rect, buf: &mut Buffer) {
-        if self.items.is_empty() {
+        if self.items.is_empty() || area.height == 0 {
             return;
         }
         for (i, item) in self.items.iter().enumerate().take(area.height as usize) {
@@ -30,6 +30,15 @@ impl List {
         }
     }
+
+    /// Regression test: rendering an empty list into a zero-height area used to panic
+    /// because the bounds check only looked at `self.items`, not `area.height`.
+    #[cfg(test)]
+    mod tests {
+        use super::*;
+
+        #[test]
+        fn render_empty_list_zero_height_does_not_panic() {
+            let area = Rect::new(0, 0, 10, 0);
+            let mut buf = Buffer::empty(area);
+            List::default().render(area, &mut buf);
+        }
+    }
 }
